name: crypto-scanner-desktop
description: Crypto Scanner — Análise multi-fator com gráficos em tempo real

scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p renderer/lib && cp node_modules/lightweight-charts/dist/lightweight-charts.standalone.production.js renderer/lib/ && npx @electron/rebuild -m . 2>/dev/null || electron-rebuild 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠️  Rode manualmente: npx @electron/rebuild'
